Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Issue On The $4,000.00 Monthly Payment
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Korbholz for City National Bank. Asad Shir (Father) also present.

Mr. Korbholz reported that Ms. Dolch had agreed to serve as Successor Co-Trustee. The Court stated that it was satisfied with the declaration of Mr. Shir.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Rich Lee.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Michael Korbholz appeared for City National Bank (Trustee).

The Court excepted the resignation of the City National Bank (current trustee) and appointed Debra Dolch as the Successor Trustee. Bond is required, Counsel is to include the amount of the bond in the order. The Court questioned the $4,000.00 monthly payment, the $10,000.00 yearly vacation amount, and why the expenses cannot be paid directly from the trust. Counsel responded that this had been the practice for several years and that he did not know why the vacation costed that much. In addition, the Court questioned the $245,000.00 used for the purchase of the home. Mr. Korbholz informed the Court that the settlement agreement in the trust allowed it and that the annuity payments would go on for life or guaranteed for twenty years. The Court directed Mr. Korbholz to submit an order reflecting the changes of the
Trustees, leaving the fee amount blank and continued the issue of the $4,000.00 monthly payment to December 04, 2007.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: Trina Ayala CSR#12964. Bailiff: Rob Harris. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
